serviceNotes.engine oil: OM646 four-cylinder diesel: flexible ASSYST up to 25,000 km / 12 months on later cars; earlier fixed plans may be 15,000 km—follow cluster. Rec 15,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.

serviceSources.engine oil: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU & ASSYST PLUS — maximum indicated Oil Service up to 25,000 km / 12 months where ASSYST equipped; early W211 OM646 may use 15,000 km fixed plan (follow cluster). Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (E 220 CDI) lists 10,000 km — not same ASSYST generation; retained 25,000 km as later EU ASSYST ceiling.
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211/S211) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — OM646 four-cylinder CDI air filter 60,000 km / 48 months (inspection table)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Mercedes-Benz W211 OM646 EU service sheet — diesel fuel filter 60,000 km; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service confirms 60,000 km (E 220 CDI proxy)
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — long-life coolant ~150,000 km orientation; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service lists 90,000 km / 5 years for older CDI — W211 table may differ
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil preventive ~100,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil preventive ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W211 4MATIC workshop orientation
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential preventive ~60,000 km — workshop orientation
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: 4MATIC / RWD rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory / serpentine belt ~100,000 km preventive — Mercedes-Benz W211 EU orientation; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service lists 100,000 km (E 220 CDI proxy)
